narrative:
Antwerp Village (precinct in Paulding County) has 1,053 registered voters, with 59.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.2 percentage points.
